Toronto, Canada Get in Touch
Services

From first sketch to final styling.

Four service lines, delivered independently or as a single continuous process — depending on how much of the journey you'd like us to carry.

01

Concept & Space Planning

Before any finish is chosen, we resolve how a space should move — sightlines, circulation, natural light and the relationship between rooms. This is the architectural skeleton every later decision hangs on.

  • — Site analysis & light study
  • — Layout & circulation planning
  • — 3D concept visualization
  • — Material & palette direction
02

Full Interior Design

End-to-end design and delivery — from mood board to move-in. We manage trades, sourcing and installation so the only decision left for you is where to sit first.

  • — Full FF&E specification
  • — Lighting & millwork design
  • — Contractor & trade coordination
  • — On-site installation & styling
03

Bespoke Furnishing

When nothing on the market fits the room correctly, we draw it ourselves — working with a small circle of joiners, upholsterers and metalworkers to build pieces made for one address only.

  • — Custom joinery & cabinetry
  • — Upholstery & textile direction
  • — Lighting & hardware design
  • — Art & object curation
04

Hospitality & Restaurant Design

Dining rooms, bars and hotel interiors designed for both the guest and the operator — beautiful under a camera, and durable under a Friday night service.

  • — Front & back-of-house planning
  • — Bar & dining concept design
  • — Acoustic & lighting design
  • — Brand-aligned material direction
Process

How a project moves through the studio.

01

Discover

Site visit, brief and budget conversation.

02

Design

Concept, layout and material direction.

03

Deliver

Sourcing, trades and on-site management.

04

Style

Final layer — art, objects and light.

Let's work out which service your space needs.
